title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 96.200 - Annual report — how, when made
text:
96.200.  Annual report — how, when made. — The board shall make on or before the second Monday in June of each year a detailed report to the city council, showing the receipts of all funds and the expenditures therefrom, and showing each donation and amount thereof.
(RSMo 1939 § 7041, A.L. 1969 p. 171) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 6895
